entries.name: Getting Started
entries.summary: New player tips and progression phase breakdown.

preview.excerpt: Everything a new player needs to know — from your first steps in Lumbridge to understanding the core progression phases.

entries.name: Progression Router
entries.summary: Smart routing tool that calculates an optimal progression path based on your goals and current stats.

preview.excerpt: Input your current levels, goals, and constraints. The router calculates an optimal step-by-step path accounting for level gates, XP requirements, inventory, and item pre-requisites.

entries.name: Attack
entries.summary: The Attack skill determines accuracy in melee combat.

preview.excerpt: Attack is a melee combat skill which determines the accuracy of a player's attacks when using melee weapons. Higher Attack allows the use of stronger weapons.

entries.name: Strength
entries.summary: Strength increases the maximum melee damage a player can deal.

preview.excerpt: Strength is a melee combat skill that determines the amount of damage a player can inflict in combat. Higher Strength levels allow players to deal more damage per hit.

entries.name: Defence
entries.summary: Defence reduces the chance of being hit by opponents.

preview.excerpt: Defence is a melee combat skill that decreases the likelihood of an opponent successfully landing a hit on a player. Higher Defence allows use of stronger armour.

entries.name: Ranged
entries.summary: Ranged allows combat from a distance using projectiles.

preview.excerpt: Ranged is a combat skill that allows players to attack from a distance using bows, crossbows, and thrown weapons. It is one of the three combat styles.

entries.name: Magic
entries.summary: Magic enables spellcasting using runes.

preview.excerpt: Magic is one of the most versatile skills in the game, used for combat, teleportation, enchanting, and alchemy. Spells require runes to cast.

entries.name: Prayer
entries.summary: Prayer grants temporary combat boosts and protection.

preview.excerpt: Prayer is a skill that can be trained by burying bones or offering them at the altar in Edgeville Monastery. Active prayers drain prayer points over time.

entries.name: Melee
entries.summary: Overview of melee combat mechanics.

preview.excerpt: Melee combat uses Attack, Strength, and Defence skills. Weapon choice, combat style, and enemy weaknesses all affect damage and accuracy.

entries.name: Bosses
entries.summary: List of boss monsters and their mechanics.

preview.excerpt: Bosses are powerful monsters that typically require high combat stats and specific strategies to defeat. They drop valuable and unique items.

entries.name: Weapons
entries.summary: Weapons available in Old School RuneScape.

preview.excerpt: Weapons vary by attack style, speed, and level requirement. Melee weapons include swords and axes; ranged weapons include bows and crossbows.

entries.name: Armour
entries.summary: Armour sets and their defensive stats.

preview.excerpt: Armour provides defensive bonuses against melee, ranged, and magic attacks. Sets are typically unlocked at specific Defence levels.

entries.name: Misthalin
entries.summary: Starting region. Lumbridge, Varrock, Draynor.

entries.name: Morytania
entries.summary: Undead-heavy region. Requires Priest in Peril. Contains Barrows and Slayer Tower.

preview.excerpt: Morytania is locked behind Priest in Peril. Home to Barrows, the Slayer Tower, and high-level Slayer tasks.

entries.name: Kandarin
entries.summary: Large western region. Ardougne, Camelot, NMZ.

entries.name: Troll Country
entries.summary: Northern mountains. God Wars Dungeon.

entries.name: Ape Atoll
entries.summary: Monkey island. Locked behind Monkey Madness I. Best melee training.

preview.excerpt: Ape Atoll is unlocked by completing Monkey Madness I. Contains the Maniacal Monkey tunnels — the best melee XP in the game.

entries.name: Kharidian Desert
entries.summary: Desert region. Al Kharid, Pyramid, Desert Treasure.

entries.name: Zeah
entries.summary: Continent of Zeah. Chambers of Xeric. Partially quest-gated.

preview.excerpt: Zeah is a large continent with multiple sub-regions. Chambers of Xeric — the most valuable raid — is located here.

entries.name: Wilderness
entries.summary: PvP-enabled region. KBD lair, Revenant caves, high-risk rewards.

entries.name: Priest in Peril
entries.summary: Unlocks Morytania region access.

entries.name: Monkey Madness I
entries.summary: Unlocks Ape Atoll and MM Tunnels. Grants large combat XP.

entries.name: Desert Treasure
entries.summary: Unlocks Ancient Magicks. Requires 50 Magic, 53 Thieving, 10 Slayer, 50 Firemaking.

entries.name: Regicide
entries.summary: Unlocks access to Zul-Andra and Zulrah.

entries.name: Tale of the Righteous
entries.summary: Zeah intro quest. Partially enables CoX access.

entries.name: Abyssal Demon
entries.summary: Level 124 Slayer monster. Requires 85 Slayer. Drops Abyssal Whip.

entries.name: Zulrah
entries.summary: Solo boss in Zul-Andra. Requires Regicide. Drops Toxic Blowpipe and Magic Fang.

entries.name: King Black Dragon
entries.summary: Wilderness boss. Drops Dragon pickaxe and KBD heads.

entries.name: Abyssal Whip
entries.summary: Best-in-slot melee training weapon. Requires 70 Attack.

entries.name: Toxic Blowpipe
entries.summary: Fast ranged weapon from Zulrah. Requires 75 Ranged.

entries.name: Magic Fang
entries.summary: Zulrah drop. Used to create Toxic Trident.

entries.name: Twisted Bow
entries.summary: Chambers of Xeric unique. Best-in-slot ranged weapon. Requires 75 Ranged.

entries.name: Scythe of Vitur
entries.summary: Theatre of Blood unique. Best melee weapon for multi-target.

entries.name: Kodai Wand
entries.summary: Chambers of Xeric unique. Best-in-slot magic weapon.

entries.name: CoX Reward Pool
entries.summary: Unique drops from Chambers of Xeric including Twisted Bow, Kodai Wand, and Scythe.

entries.name: Runes
entries.summary: Runes used for casting Magic spells.

preview.excerpt: Runes are small, magical stones used to cast spells. They can be purchased from magic shops, crafted via Runecraft, or obtained as drops.

stats.label: Types
stats.value: Air, Water, Earth, Fire, Mind, Body, Cosmic, Chaos, Nature, Law, Death, Blood, Soul
